===== 6) APP.PY CONTINUE_TRIP BLOK =====

 1739:                 meta = ()
 1741:             cnt = _bag_count_from_meta(meta)
 1784:     current_index = stops.index(current_stop) if current_stop in stops else 0
 1786:     def make_stop_payload(stop_name, idx):
 1796:         if idx == current_index:
 1798:             status = "Canlı"
 1799:             eta = "Şimdi"
 1800:         elif idx == current_index + 1:
 1801:             kind = "next"
 1802:             status = "Sıradaki"
 1803:             eta = "Sırada"
 1804:         elif idx > current_index:
 1805:             kind = "upcoming"
 1806:             status = "Bekliyor"
 1807:             eta = f"{idx - current_index} durak sonra"
 1809:             kind = "passed"
 1810:             status = "Geçildi"
 1811:             eta = "Geçildi"
 1814:         if idx == current_index:
 1815:             distance = "0 km"
 1816:         elif idx > current_index:
 1817:             distance = f"{idx - current_index} durak"
 1819:             distance = "Geçildi"
 1824:             "status": status,
 1825:             "eta": eta,
 1826:             "distance": distance,

===== RAPOR BITTI =====
